title: Caramelized Floral Coconut Spanish Stir-fry
description: A comforting and floral dish featuring coconut milk in a low-sodium friendly preparation with sous-vide technique for crispy texture.

ingredients.name: floral-infused water or infused olive oil

instructions: Prepare a sous-vide bag with floral-infused water or infused olive oil. Seal the bag and place it in your sous-vide machine at 160°F for 3 hours.
While the vegetables are being cooked, mix low-sodium soy sauce and chicken broth to make a flavorful marinade. Let it sit aside.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat, add oil and onions until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant but not browned.
Remove the sous-vide bag from the machine, open, and stir in floral-infused water or infused olive oil evenly. Let it come to a boil over medium heat.
Pour in low-sodium soy sauce and chicken broth marinade into the pan with onions and garlic. Bring to a simmer for 5-7 minutes until slightly thickened.
Add shredded unsweetened coconut to the pan, stir gently to coat evenly, cook on low heat for an additional 10 minutes or until the coconut becomes caramelized and golden brown.
Serve hot as a side dish with grilled meats or as a main course with crusty bread.
